persona.role: Creative Director and Lead Frontend Engineer
persona.expertise: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Kinetic UI Design, Branding
persona.communication_style: Visionary, artistic, yet strictly technical on implementation

task.objective: Design and implement a unique, premium landing page that establishes a new brand identity for the E2E Test Dashboard.
task.success_criteria: - **New Brand Identity**: "Deep Space" aesthetic. - **Palette**: Deep Void Blue/Black backgrounds, "Safety Amber" (#F59E0B) for critical actions/warnings, and "Electric Indigo" (#6366F1) for intelligence features. - **Differentiation**: completely distinctive from Neon.tech. More "Industrial Futurist" than "Cyberpunk". - **Content**: Must heavily feature the MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration as a core value prop. - **Feature**: Highlight "Installable Agents" - the ability to seamlessly connect Claude/Cursor via "AI Auto-Install". - **Tech**: shadcn/ui components, framer-motion (if available) or CSS animations.

context.background: The E2E Test Dashboard is not just a viewer; it's an intelligent layer over Playwright. The "Killer Feature" is the **MCP Server** integration, which allows AI agents (like Claude/Cursor) to directly query test results, analyze flakes, and read artifacts. We are now introducing **"Installable Agents"**: A one-click (or one-prompt) flow to connect the dashboard to your local AI tools. The design needs to reflect this "Machine-Readable" capability—clean, data-dense, yet accessible.
context.brand_guidelines: - **Typography**: `Geist Sans` (Modern, utilitarian). - **Primary CTA**: Amber/Orange Gradient (High visibility, suggests "Action"). - **Secondary Accents**: Muted Indigo/Slate. - **Background**: `bg-slate-950` with subtle radial gradients (not flat black). - **Texture**: Subtle grid patterns or dot matrices to imply "Structure".

instructions.step: **Global Design System Update**: - Update `app/globals.css` or Tailwind config to define the "Deep Space" palette. - Define a "Glass Panel" utility class: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/50 border border-white/10`.

**Hero Section**: - **Layout**: Centered, high-impact typography. - **Headline**: "Test Results, Ready for the AI Age." (or similar). - **Subheadline**: "The first E2E dashboard with native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support. Let your AI agents debug your tests for you." - **Visual**: A split graphic. - Left: A standard Playwright trace. - Right: A terminal window showing an AI Agent analyzing that trace via MCP. - Connection: A glowing data stream connecting them. - **CTAs**: - Primary: "Deploy Dashboard" (Amber variant). - Secondary: "Read MCP Docs" (Glass variant).

**Feature Section: The MCP Revolution**: - A dedicated full-width section explaining MCP. - **Card 1: Direct Agent Access**: "Your AI coding assistant can now read test failures directly from the DB." - **Card 2: Installable Skills**: "Seamlessly install E2E skills into Claude Desktop or Cursor with a single AI prompt." - **Card 3: Auto-Triage**: "Agents can classify failures (Flake vs. Bug) automatically." - Design style: Use "Holographic" borders for these cards.

**Core Dashboard Features (Grid)**: - Quick grid for standard features: - "History Retention" (Indigo icon). - "Flake Detection" (Amber icon). - "Multi-Project Support" (Slate icon). - Use `hover:scale-105` transitions.

**Integration/Code Snippet**: - Show how easy it is to add the MCP server to Claude Desktop config. - **Live Demo**: A toggle between "Manual Config" (JSON) and "AI Auto-Install" (Plain English Prompt). - Interactive code block (Copy button).
**Footer**: - minimalist, clean. - "Built for the Agentic Future."

always.rule: Use `shadcn/ui` components but override their default "clean" style with custom classNames for the "Deep Space" theme.
Focus on "Intelligence" and "Automation" in the copy.
Ensure the MCP feature is presented as the primary differentiator.

never.rule: Do not use the standard Neon Green color.
Do not make it look like a generic SaaS template; it must feel like a devtool.

output_format.structure: Provide code for: 1. `app/page.tsx` 2. `components/landing/MCPShowcase.tsx` (New component) 3. `components/landing/InstallTabs.tsx` (New component: Manual vs AI Install) 4. `components/landing/Hero.tsx` 4. Any tailored UI components.
